scripts.build: cargo build-sbf --manifest-path programs/anchor-fairfun/Cargo.toml && cargo build-sbf --manifest-path programs/fairfun-rewards/Cargo.toml && cargo build-sbf --manifest-path programs/star-nft/Cargo.toml && cargo build-sbf --manifest-path programs/wheel/Cargo.toml
scripts.test: npm run build && cargo test -p anchor-fairfun && cargo test -p fairfun-rewards && cargo check --workspace
